description: Production A/B experiment framework with sticky bucketing, guardrail metrics, and auto-rollback. Enhance the existing ExperimentService and ABTestIntegration. Add 'time well spent' regret prediction, 'show me less' negative signal retraining, topic hide list, following mode, and reset-recommendations.
steps: Enhance packages/recommendations/src/experiment/experiment-service.ts: add sticky bucketing (persist user bucket assignment in a Map or external store interface). Add guardrail metrics: define GuardrailMetric interface (name, threshold, direction: 'above'|'below'). Add checkGuardrails() method that evaluates all metrics and returns { breached: boolean, metric: string }. Add autoRollback() that disables an experiment when a guardrail is breached.

Create packages/recommendations/src/experiment/guardrails.ts: GuardrailEvaluator class. Predefined guardrails: session_duration_drop > 20%, rage_quit_rate > 5%, report_rate > 1%. Methods: evaluate(experimentId, metrics) -> GuardrailResult, triggerRollback(experimentId).

Create packages/recommendations/src/personalization/user-signals.ts: UserSignalProcessor class. Handles: 'show_me_less' (negative feedback on content type/topic, stored per user, fed into feature store within 1 hour), 'topic_hide' (user hides entire topic, immediately effective in candidate filtering), 'reset_recommendations' (nuclear: clears all user embeddings and interaction history, triggers cold-start). Methods: processNegativeSignal(), hideTopics(), resetProfile(), getActiveHiddenTopics().

Create packages/recommendations/src/personalization/time-well-spent.ts: TimeWellSpent class. Tracks daily usage per user. Computes 'regret prediction' score based on: session length > 30min, rapid scrolling, low engagement-per-minute. Methods: trackSession(userId, duration, engagements), getDailySummary(userId), predictRegret(userId) -> { regretScore: number, suggestion: string }. Surfaces 'you have been on this for 30 min' notification (opt-out-able).

Create packages/recommendations/src/personalization/following-mode.ts: FollowingMode class. Pure reverse-chronological feed of followed accounts only. No algorithmic ranking. Methods: getFollowingFeed(userId, page, pageSize) -> items sorted by timestamp desc. Integrates with FeedService as an AlgorithmType.Following option.
Create packages/recommendations/src/personalization/index.ts barrel export for all personalization modules.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/guardrails.test.ts: test metric evaluation, breach detection, auto-rollback trigger.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/user-signals.test.ts: test negative signal processing, topic hiding, profile reset.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/time-well-spent.test.ts: test session tracking, regret prediction, daily summary.
Update packages/recommendations/src/index.ts to export new personalization modules and enhanced experiment service.
Update packages/ranking/src/types.ts: add AlgorithmType.Following = 'following' to the enum.
Ensure all existing tests still pass after changes.
acceptance_criteria: Sticky bucketing: same user always gets same bucket even across service restarts (tested)
Guardrails evaluate correctly and trigger auto-rollback on breach (tested)
Negative signal ('show me less') is processed and stored for retraining (tested)
Topic hide list immediately filters content (tested)
Time well spent computes regret score and surfaces notification (tested)
Following mode returns purely chronological results (tested)
